{"society_power": 5.0, "state_power": 7.0, "society_change": 0.5, "state_change": -1.5, "key_event": "Civil War of 1891 and Parliamentary Republic's congressional supremacy", "reasoning": "Balmaceda's defeat weakened the centralized executive state, shifting power to Congress and cabinet instability, lowering state power; society power rises modestly as an entrenched oligarchic Congress constrains the executive and a nascent northern working class emerges, though this \"society\" remained narrow and elite-dominated."}
